PRIMARY RECALL WIN — Brann (catalog tier2 team) UEFA Conference League Q2 vs Universitatea Cluj was a genuinely unboarded fixture. BOTH legs added (high): away Thu 23 July 17:00 UTC (Cluj, Romania — 20:00 local EEST / 19:00 CEST), home Thu 30 July 17:00 UTC (Brann Stadion, Bergen — 19:00 CEST). Dates high-confidence across ESPN/FOX/beIN/Sofascore/tvkampen; kickoff times confirmed by 2+ sources (Sofascore explicitly tagged leg 1 '17:00 UTC', beIN+FOX agree both legs). This came from the 20 July grader's carried follow-up to check Euro qualifiers for the tier2 Norwegian clubs.

RIGHTS CORRECTION (matters for many future events): Europa League + Conference League = VIAPLAY in Norway through 2031, NOT TV 2 Play. TV 2 holds ONLY Champions League (through 2027). Sources: tvtilbud.no + tvkampen.com + nettavisen.no/sport/viaplay-bekrefter-ny-fotballavtale/s/5-95-3010868. The norwegian-rights skill line 'Champions League / Europa League -> TV 2 Play [solid]' is STALE and should become: CL -> TV 2 Play; EL + Conference League -> Viaplay. Yates/Bernal). Stage-16 summary amended; evidence extended with FloBikes + procyclingstats.

BODO/GLIMT vs Union Saint-Gilloise (CL Q3) STILL held off the board: UEFA has not yet published the exact match day (4 vs 5 / 11 vs 12 Aug) or kickoff — only a single-source FOX tentative 'Aug 4' for leg 1. Guessing a high-profile CL date/time is exactly the wrong-event risk the prompt warns against. Boards once UEFA schedules it. Glimt's tie IS Champions League so TV 2 Play is the correct channel prior (TV 2 holds CL); the earlier Avisa Nordland/Direktesport qualifying-split nuance for Glimt stands.
